items.quote: I feel like Roy V's chin might be done though. Certified glass

items.claim: Max Holloway has absorbed over 2100 significant strikes in his career.
Max Holloway has been knocked down in three of his last four fights.
items.quote: knocked down in three of his last four

items.claim: Conor McGregor is unlikely to perform well over five rounds following a five-year layoff.
items.quote: five rounds after a five-year layoff, you don't think he's realistically able to do it? I mean, you're right. He shouldn't be. Statistically, it's incredibly uh unlikely

items.claim: Khalil Rountree's gas tank is a significant liability after the first round.
items.quote: Round Tree's gas tank is the worry, man. That's what it is. His skills against an Kolia early match, but after round one, I don't know.

items.claim: Khalil Rountree possesses some of the best Muay Thai in the division.
items.quote: Roundre's got awesome Muay Thai. I love Roundtree style. I think his Muay Thai is some of the best.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is undersized compared to the top middleweights.
items.quote: I'm worried about Bobby Knuckles being undersized against some of the best middleweights in the world

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is a mid-tier middleweight.
items.quote: I feel like Krillov pretty mid.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is susceptible to being caught by straight punches down the center.
items.quote: I just think Pinos is going to connect with straits. And Caesar Almeida gets caught down the center and he's looking slower.

items.claim: Damen Pinos has high-level hand speed and striking technique.
items.quote: hits hard, good hand speed, lots to like, lots to like, a good prospect, real real talent, I think.
